name: Chained Exploit Followed by Suspicious Events
notes: Reports an exploit or attack type activity from the same source IP followed by suspicious account activity from the same destination IP as the original event within 15 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Post Exploit Account Activity in order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence
conditions_text: when a subset of at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Exploits Backdoors and Trojans, in order, with the same source IP followed by a subset of at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Post Exploit Account Activity in order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence, within 15 minutes
thresholds: when a subset of at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Exploits Backdoors and Trojans, in order, with the same source IP followed by a subset of at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Post Exploit Account Activity in order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence, within 15 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Chained Exploit Followed by Suspicious Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when a subset of at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Exploits Backdoors and Trojans, in order, with the same source IP followed by a subset of at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Post Exploit Account Activity in order from the same destination IP from the previous sequence, within 15 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Exploit Followed by Suspicious Host Activity - Chained

Event description: An exploit or attack type activity detected from a source IP followed by suspicious host activity from the destination within 15 minutes.  This could indicate a compromised host.  To find the original attacking host search for the source of this event as a target of an exploit within the previous 15 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
